title: Kemise Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kemise, with a Z-Score of +3.71. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kemise is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 20%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 6.0 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, leading to a critical situation.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
